what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment for the design-assets channel, linking it to a specific image asset URI and noting when it was added.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter between triple-dash delimiters.
It belongs to the channel design-assets.
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with microsecond precision and an explicit UTC offset.
There is no body text or code after the frontmatter.
standouts: The target URI contains a filename with a space and a '(2)' suffix, suggesting a possible duplicate or second version.
The record uses an image:// URI scheme rather than a filesystem path or URL.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata keys.
Attachment ids are prefixed with att-.
Targets use a project-specific image:// URI scheme.
concerns: The target URI includes spaces and parentheses, which can be fragile for naive parsers.
There is no checksum, file size, MIME type, or format information.
No author, uploader, or parent message/thread context is recorded.
The '(2)' suffix hints at an unresolved naming collision but is not explained.
notes: A channel-memory attachment record that points the design-assets channel to a yellow V-circle icon image.
questions: Which message, thread, or design artifact is this attachment attached to?
Does the '(2)' suffix indicate a duplicate file, a second version, or an exported copy?
Where does the image:// URI scheme resolve to a physical or stored asset?
Who added this attachment and what is the asset's intended use?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it records an image attachment tied to the design-assets channel with a timestamped reference.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog image attachments associated with the design-assets channel so they can be referenced, retrieved, and audited by URI.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme and the duplicate-style '(2)' filename suffix are the most distinctive elements.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to a specific image asset, supporting retrieval and audit of design-assets attachments in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-3d9a9f65 in the design-assets channel references image asset Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2) via an image:// URI and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record that a specific icon image was attached to the design-assets channel at a precise time.
